title: Atos India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Atos India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Atos India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Full Stack Developer to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Atos India:
Atos India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atos India!
